title: Misato as Shinji
wikitext:
[]: Misato as Shinji             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Tue Nov 16, 2010 2:00 pm So just as a personal note i never realized how much Misato is like Shinji (kinda sad for me to have just realized it but then again im terrible at noticing these things) ... at least wit the whole dad thing... makes me wonder what eva would be like if Misato was Shinji, as in her being the 14 year old pilot of an Eva and what not... Just a little thought i had lol lets see what u guys think about that idea (dont be too mean to me though =D)

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Nov 16, 2010 2:17 pm I've always wanted a fanfic in which traumatized-teenage-post-2I Misato had to pilot an Eva, time skip to 2015 and she's the group commander for the other pilots. You have to wonder just where Misato's unusual cheerfulness stems from my money's on the beer and if she'd still have it...

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Nov 16, 2010 2:25 pm I would figure she wouldn't Az. Almost everyone in Eva runs away from their problems in one way or another; Shinji and Gendo through doing nothing, Misato through beer and sex, and Asuka through her superiority complex and wanting to think that she is an adult. I can't really think of how or if Rei and Ritsuko do, but I think that one of the points in Eva is that everyone has a way of avoiding or running from their real issues unless just thrown in their face, and as we have seen they just breakdown once they are confronted by them- Asuka+Arael, Shinji+Lilliel(?)/Instrumentality, and etc.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Tue Nov 16, 2010 2:46 pm Azathoth wrote: You have to wonder just where Misato's unusual cheerfulness stems from my money's on the beer and if she'd still have it...

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Wed Nov 17, 2010 12:31 am I dunnoh... i think that Misato and Shinji beyond the every one cover up how they feel they both had something with their dads that they had problems with... i thought this was just like a ohh wow... they coulda been in opposite places and it woulda made an entirly new story

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Thu Nov 18, 2010 12:44 am well, even if Misato was the one piloting, they wouldn't exactly be in opposite situations. i can't think of a way for Shinji to have her job if she's piloting at age 14. but it would be interesting to read some kind of fanfic along the lines of Misato as a teenage Eva pilot. i wonder if there are any good ones out there like that?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Nov 21, 2010 5:34 pm I haven't read any FFs about Misato as a teenage Eva pilot, but there was that one Doujin where Misato had to grow 300 feet tall and battle an angel as "Misatogelion."

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Nov 21, 2010 6:15 pm Misato replacing Shinji would be a hard, if not an impossible task; catatonic teenagers don't make good mecha pilots. Divorcing Misato from her preslut-and-beer condition is unsuccessful either. We don't now how Misato would've developed as a person if she hadn't became catatonic.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Nov 22, 2010 4:30 am I'm not sure where the notion that Misato is a slut really comes from... Did she even have any boyfriends other than Kaji? There's clearly a lack of empirical evidence on that front. Sleep with one dude, get labeled a slut for life. Try to get the pants off of one teenage boy, get labeled a shotacon for life... Hey, wait a minute...

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Mon Nov 22, 2010 6:29 am In ep 15, while spilling her guts to Kaji about lying to him while breaking up earlier: "I'm a coward! I just use men when I need to." ... how far that statement goes or how seriously her self-hating is clouding her judgement is anyone's guess.

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Mon Nov 22, 2010 12:30 pm i don't think Misato is a slut at all. i think it was just that when she finally realized she'd been using Kaji, and using that sexual aspect of their relationship, she was disgusted with herself. it doesn't mean she's a ho, she just regrets it and it makes her feel dirty about herself, probably. to see a tiny Misato as a pilot would be weird. i'm thinking maybe she'd be sort of like Asuka? but definitely without the arrogance. wanting attention, but in a different way than Shinji. Asuka and Misato seem to share that gung ho attitude of "i don't care if it doesn't work i have to try " (i found this today and it reminded me of this thread. i thought it was pretty cute) SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Nov 22, 2010 12:32 pm lilim wrote: i don't think Misato is a slut at all. i think it was just that when she finally realized she'd been using Kaji, and using that sexual aspect of their relationship, she was disgusted with herself. it doesn't mean she's a ho, she just regrets it and it makes her feel dirty about herself, probably.

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Mon Nov 22, 2010 12:35 pm yeah. she seemed to really love Kaji. which indicates to me that her dressing the way she does, and flirting and joking with people doesn't mean to her what it would mean to most girls. she doesn't really want to back that up and slut around with people. she cares about someone already. she just has issues that make her act out, and she's ashamed of that when she's faced with it in the later episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Nov 22, 2010 3:05 pm Hmmm, I think there are a couple on FF.Net. But I also think one or two are M/S fics. There's one I believe where her and Ritsuko are kids piloting the Eva's and Naoko and Yui are alive. I can't recall the names, but I know I've at least seen them before for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Mon Nov 22, 2010 6:01 pm Heh a 14 year old Misato piloting an Eva? lol. It would be even cooler if Kaji were 14 years old. Then they could all partake in sex in the Eva...or maybe sex in the entry plug....or something like that! Wow that sounds like it could go in some fanfic or hentai plot....;)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Dec 20, 2010 7:34 am The Misato/Shinji parallels are some of the most obvious in the series, but there are other combinations as well. Besides them losing their parents to SEELE/NERV experiments, if you buy into the whole Dr. Kat = Kaworu, then there's the Rei/Yui, Kaworu/Dr. Kat parallel as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Mon Dec 20, 2010 12:06 pm It certainly would be an interesting idea, but let's think about this. If one has Misato switch places with Shinji then would that not mean that Shinji would trade places Misato? Jumping off of that, Asuka would be Kaji, Kaji would be Asuka, Rei would be Ritsuko, Ritsuko would be Rei, Dr. K would be Gendo, and Gendo would be dead. Shinji would probably go for the Project E position given his personality, Rei would be the Ops Directer, and I'm generally getting the sense that this would be rather interesting. OK, so Legendary's already doing his own fic where Maya's in Shinji's position, and I'm doing that Peggy Sue/Slider thing where the Children and their parents do a role reversal , but considering that the casting for Eva revolves around the Power Trio I really think there's some real potential to mix-and-match the casting in fanfic. . . . Man, I really gotta set up a dedicated thread for posting plot bunnies on this board some time.

[]: Re: Misato as Shinji             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Dec 21, 2010 1:55 pm Animejunkie wrote: makes me wonder what eva would be like if Misato was Shinji, as in her being the 14 year old pilot of an Eva and what not...

[]: Re: Misato as Shinji             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Dec 21, 2010 6:49 pm the_seventh_child wrote: the show would end up with a...threesome between Asuka, Rei and Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 21, 2010 7:03 pm At the OP: There's the Reverse IRC-RP (I was Misato. She has...issues, but is cheerful.) that Legendary based his Change in Ages fanfic (Cody mentioned it.) on.

Just a little
